reason: ESPN and API-Football already cover all P0 capabilities. Remaining gaps are implementation gaps, not provider gaps.

standings_competition_context.description: API-Football has standings endpoint but not wired to enrichment pipeline
standings_competition_context.resolution: Wire existing endpoint, no new provider needed

h2h_head_to_head.description: Both providers have H2H methods but lack typed result with evidence capture
h2h_head_to_head.resolution: Add typed result wrapper, no new provider needed

cross_provider_identity.description: Crosswalk table exists but not populated for real events
cross_provider_identity.resolution: Implement crosswalk population logic, no new provider needed

provider_probing.sportdb_dev: NOT_PROBED - no capability gap requires it
provider_probing.thesportsdb: NOT_PROBED - no capability gap requires it

conclusion: No new provider needed. Proceed to Phase 8 with existing ESPN and API-Football.
